svg.title: Build rhythm: separate Codex and GitHub time horizons
svg.desc: Build rhythm contains two independent time horizons that do not imply causation: a recent Codex use module and a long-term GitHub activity module. Codex is shown daily from 2026-06-13 through 2026-07-12; GitHub is shown weekly from 2021-07-11 through 2026-07-05.
svg.text: Recent Codex use and long-term GitHub contribution history

g.desc: Codex use, last 30 days at daily grain. Codex account lifetime: 20,860,271,364 tokens. Last 30 days: 16,975,567,881 tokens, equivalent to about $14,252 at public API prices, not a Codex bill. Peak day Jul 1, 2026: 1,748,633,377 tokens. The final day is partial.

GitHub activity, last five years at weekly grain. The panels show commits, additions, and deletions; their scales compress large spikes so quieter weeks remain visible. Totals: 2,938 commits, 29,104,554 additions, 28,513,917 deletions, and 159 active weeks. Highest commit week Jun 28, 2026: 795 commits. Largest line-change week Jul 5, 2026: 24,222,547 additions and 21,992,716 deletions.

svg.text: 159 active GitHub weeks · Typical week 2k lines changed · Updated Jul 13, 2026
Public-API comparison, not a Codex bill.
